name: JiimSmith Results empty state renders cleanly
description: Verify that the campaign Results tab renders the current empty-performance state clearly when the selected campaign has no published posts.

planSteps.description: Open the ReelMatrix web app, go to Campaigns, open the active or first campaign, and switch to Results.
Verify the exact empty-state heading text "No published posts yet" is visible.
Verify the empty-state explanatory text "Approve an asset to publish it" is visible.
Verify the data-source banner includes "Mock data" and "Connect owned-destination analytics + signup attribution".
Verify the visible metric tile labels include Impressions, Clicks, Signups, Activated, Paid, and Modeled pipeline.
Verify at least one visible zero-value metric is present, such as "0" or "$0".
